[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101000001 4
1 0010010100 3
2 0001011000 3
3 1000111000 4
4 1111111111 a
5 1111111111 a
6 1111111111 a
7 1111111111 a

01 10 1000000000 1
12 21 0001001000 2
23 32 0000001000 1
34 43 0000011001 3
45 54 0101101001 5
56 65 1100100011 5
67 76 0110000111 5
70 07 0100000100 2

02 20 0100100000 2
13 31 0000011000 2
24 42 0101101000 4
35 53 0000001001 2
46 64 0100100001 3
57 75 0101000011 4
60 06 1100100100 4
71 17 0011000010 3

03 30 0000000000 a
14 41 0001011000 3 match 2
25 52 0101101000 4
36 63 0000000001 1
47 74 0101000001 3
50 05 1100100000 3
61 16 1010000010 3
72 27 0101000000 2

04 40 0100100000 2
15 51 1001001010 4
26 62 0100100000 2
37 73 0000000001 1
